Doi Tung

Home / Compare / Doi Tung
specialty single-origin arabica royal-project sustainable award-winning

Doi Tung

ดอยตุง

4.6
★ ★ ★ ★ ★
780 reviews
Origin Doi Tung, Chiang Rai (Royal Project)
Roast Levels light medium dark
Price Range ฿220–380 / 200g
Founded 1988
Formats ground, whole bean, drip bag, gift sets

A product of the Mae Fah Luang Foundation under the Royal Initiative of H.R.H. Princess Srinagarindra. Doi Tung coffee is grown on the slopes of Doi Tung mountain, replacing opium cultivation with sustainable highland arabica of exceptional quality.

Official Website ↗

Flavor Profile

Elegant and refined. Floral aromatics with honey sweetness, gentle stone fruit acidity, and a silky, lingering finish. One of Thailand's most celebrated single-origin coffees.

Tasting Notes

honey jasmine peach silky finish

Flavor Breakdown

Body
3/5
Acidity
4/5
Sweetness
4/5
Bitterness
2/5
Aroma
5/5
